Just to kind of recap what we did. If you haven't done this yet, start with this, okay? Start with all the way back to yesterday, what we talked about, right? What's your value ladder? What does it look like? What's the price points? What are all the pieces? Where am I trying to send somebody up to? Where's my long-term goal? What do I want people to do? So, figure that out first if you haven't yet. The second step is what is my point of sale, my initial funnel, taking someone through? You got all the building blocks in your book, right? What's going to be my squeeze page? What's going to be my thing? What's going to be my upsells, my downsides? And build that whole thing out? And hopefully, you get at least those two in the next ten minutes. And if you have more, then what's the funnel I'm going to use to sell my back end, my high ticket stuff? Okay? Do you guys see how, why we use different funnels for different type things? Okay? The funnel that I need to do the front end stuff is different, usually in the middle, and it's different than usually the end. Okay? Usually it's the free plus shipping, the trip wire stuff that's down here. This is the automated webinars and invisible funnels, and this is the phone, webinar, sales script and things like that. And so typically in a business, you start with this, then you get this, and eventually you might end up going up to there. Okay?
